title: EPERM mkdir unhandled rejection
rationale: EPERM from PosthogManager mkdir escapes normal error handling as unhandled rejection; reaches Sentry via onUnhandledRejectionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the PosthogManager call site.
prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
problemSignature: Unhandled rejection with EPERM errno from background telemetry bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.
